name: @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-web
description: Workspace for Perspective Anchor Connectors web assets

scripts.build: yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-client build && yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-designer build
scripts.clean: yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-client clean && yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-designer clean
scripts.deepClean: yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-client deepClean && yarn workspace @miguelgrillo/perspective-anchor-connectors-designer deepClean
